# 1.5 User Domain Objects

## Core User DOs

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `UserDO` | `users` | userId (UUID), displayName, email, state, district, createdAt, updatedAt |
| `UserPreferenceDO` | `user_preferences` | preferenceId (UUID), userId, topic, stance, importance (1-10), embedding (vector), updatedAt |
| `MemberBillStanceDO` | `member_bill_stances` | memberId, billId, voteId, amendmentId (Option[String]), position, voteType, voteDate, congress, topics (List[String]) |

## Scoring Infrastructure DOs

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `UserLegislatorPairingDO` | `user_legislator_pairings` | userId (UUID), memberId, state, district (Option[Int]), chamber, pairedAt, validatedAt |
| `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` | `member_bill_stance_topics` | id (UUID), memberId, billId, voteId, topic, stanceDirection (String: "Progressive"/"Conservative"/"Neutral"), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]), findingId (Option[UUID]), confidence (Option[Double]), conceptSummary (Option[String]), createdAt |
| `UserBillAlignmentDO` | `user_bill_alignments` | userId (UUID), billId, topic, userStanceScore (Double), billStanceDirection (String), alignmentScore (Double 0.0-1.0), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]), findingId (Option[UUID]), computedAt |
| `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` | `user_amendment_alignments` | userId (UUID), amendmentId, billId (Option[String]), topic, userStanceScore (Double), amendmentStanceDirection (String), alignmentScore (Double 0.0-1.0), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]), findingId (Option[UUID]), computedAt |
| `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` | `stance_materialization_status` | billId (String PK), hasVotes (Boolean), hasAnalysis (Boolean), allPassesCompleted (Boolean), votesUpdatedAt (Option[Instant]), analysisCompletedAt (Option[Instant]), stancesMaterializedAt (Option[Instant]), lastScoringRunAt (Option[Instant]) |

## Score DOs

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `ScoreDO` | `scores` | userId (UUID), memberId, aggregateScore (Float 0.0-1.0), status (String: "scored"/"no_overlap"), lastUpdated, llmModel, totalBills, totalVotes, nonOverlappingTopics (List[String]), reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]) |
| `ScoreTopicDO` | `score_topics` | userId, memberId, topic, score (Float 0.0-1.0) |
| `ScoreCongressDO` | `score_congress` | userId, memberId, congress, overallScore (Float 0.0-1.0), billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed |
| `ScoreCongressTopicDO` | `score_congress_topics` | userId, memberId, congress, topic, score (Float 0.0-1.0) |
| `ScoreHistoryDO` | `score_history` | scoreId (UUID), userId, memberId, computedAt, aggregateScore, status (String: "scored"/"no_overlap"), triggerEvent, reasoning (Option[String]), reasoningEmbedding (Option[Array[Float]]) |
| `ScoreHistoryCongressDO` | `score_history_congress` | scoreId, congress, overallScore, billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed |
| `ScoreHistoryCongressTopicDO` | `score_history_congress_topics` | scoreId, congress, topic, score |
| `ScoreHistoryHighlightDO` | `score_history_highlights` | scoreId, billId, topic, stance, vote, alignment (Float 0.0-1.0) |

**Schema notes:** Migration `002-schema-expansion.sql` adds `reasoning TEXT` to `score_history`. Migration `008-score-reasoning.sql` adds `reasoning TEXT` and `reasoning_embedding vector(1536)` to `scores` and `score_history` — current explanation on `scores` (overwritten per re-score), historical explanation on `score_history` (audit trail). Embeddings enable semantic search (DJL/ONNX via `SemanticEmbeddingService` in §11.7). Migration `006-amendment-vote-linkage.sql` adds `amendment_id TEXT REFERENCES amendments(amendment_id)` (nullable) to `member_bill_stances`. Migration `009-scoring-architecture.sql` adds 5 new tables; also adds `last_stance_change_at TIMESTAMPTZ` to `users`, `status` and `non_overlapping_topics TEXT[]` to `scores`, `status` to `score_history`.

**Field naming:** `aggregateScore` (ScoreDO, ScoreHistoryDO) = all-time weighted alignment across congresses. `overallScore` (ScoreCongressDO, ScoreHistoryCongressDO) = alignment for single congress. Both are Float in 0.0-1.0 range.

**ScoreDO vs ScoreHistoryDO:** `ScoreDO` is current (mutable, uses `lastUpdated`/`llmModel`/counts); `ScoreHistoryDO` is append-only audit trail (uses `computedAt`/`triggerEvent`). Both carry `reasoning` and `reasoningEmbedding`. `ScoreDO` omits `triggerEvent`.

**Score status field:** Always `"scored"` (≥1 shared topic) or `"no_overlap"` (zero shared topics). When `"no_overlap"`, `aggregateScore = 0.0` is meaningless. `nonOverlappingTopics` lists user topics with no legislator votes — populated even on partial overlap.

**MemberBillStanceTopicDO:** Per-topic stance pre-materialized. Stores `stanceDirection` (from vote + analysis), LLM `reasoning`, `reasoningEmbedding`, `findingId` (FK to bill_findings for provenance). Populated by stance materializer (§11.9).

**UserBillAlignmentDO / UserAmendmentAlignmentDO:** Pre-computed per-bill, per-topic alignment. Computed on schedule by §11.10. Includes LLM `reasoning`, `reasoningEmbedding`, `findingId` FK.

## Question Bank DOs

| Class | Table | Key Columns |
|-------|-------|-------------|
| `QaQuestionDO` | `qa_questions` | questionId (String PK), questionText, category, displayOrder, allowCustom, active, createdAt |
| `QaQuestionTopicDO` | `qa_question_topics` | questionId, topic (composite PK), agreeStance ("Progressive"/"Conservative"), weight (Float) |
| `QaAnswerOptionDO` | `qa_answer_options` | questionId, optionValue (composite PK), displayText, stanceMultiplier (Float -1.0-1.0), importanceSignal (Int 1-10), displayOrder |
| `QaUserResponseDO` | `qa_user_responses` | responseId (UUID), userId (UUID), questionId, selectedOption (Option[String]), customText (Option[String]), respondedAt |

**Stance extraction:** For multiple-choice: user stance = `agreeStance` × `stanceMultiplier` × `weight`. Computed in scoring engine (Component 11), not DOs.

**Answer type constraint:** Exactly one of `selectedOption` or `customText` must be non-NULL (enforced by CHECK in migration 004). DO models both as `Option[String]`.

**Question lifecycle:** `active = false` soft-deletes from onboarding; existing responses preserved.

## Acceptance Criteria

**Functional:**
1. `UserDO` fields match `users` table. `userId` is `java.util.UUID`.
2. `UserPreferenceDO` fields match `user_preferences`. `importance` is `Int` (1-10).
3. `MemberBillStanceDO` fields match `member_bill_stances`. `topics` is `List[String]`. `amendmentId` is `Option[String]`.
4. All user, scoring infrastructure, score DOs: Doobie auto-derived `Read`/`Write`.
5. `ScoreDO` fields: userId, memberId (composite PK), aggregateScore, status, lastUpdated, llmModel, totalBills, totalVotes, nonOverlappingTopics, reasoning, reasoningEmbedding.
6. `ScoreCongressDO` fields: userId, memberId, congress (composite PK), overallScore, billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed.
7. `ScoreHistoryDO` includes `reasoning: Option[String]` (migration 002), `reasoningEmbedding: Option[Array[Float]]` (migration 008), `status: String`.
8. `ScoreHistoryCongressDO` fields: scoreId, congress (composite PK), overallScore, billsConsidered, votesAnalyzed.
9. `ScoreHistoryHighlightDO` maps to `AlignmentScoreOutput.highlights`: billId, topic, stance, vote, alignment.
10. All score Floats: 0.0-1.0 range.
10a. `UserLegislatorPairingDO` fields match `user_legislator_pairings`.
10b. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` fields match `member_bill_stance_topics`.
10c. `UserBillAlignmentDO` fields match `user_bill_alignments`.
10d. `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` fields match `user_amendment_alignments`.
10e. `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` fields match `stance_materialization_status`.
10f. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO.stanceDirection`: String "Progressive"/"Conservative"/"Neutral".
10g. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO.findingId`: `Option[UUID]` FK to bill_findings.
10h. `UserBillAlignmentDO.alignmentScore`, `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO.alignmentScore`: `Double` 0.0-1.0.
10i. All embeddings: `Option[Array[Float]]` (vector 1536).
11. `QaQuestionDO` fields match `qa_questions`. `questionId` is `String`. `allowCustom`, `active` are `Boolean`.
12. `QaQuestionTopicDO` fields match `qa_question_topics`. Composite PK `(questionId, topic)`. `agreeStance` is String. `weight` is `Float`.
13. `QaAnswerOptionDO` fields match `qa_answer_options`. Composite PK `(questionId, optionValue)`. `stanceMultiplier` Float (-1.0-1.0). `importanceSignal` Int (1-10).
14. `QaUserResponseDO` fields match `qa_user_responses`. `responseId` is UUID. Both `selectedOption`, `customText` are `Option[String]`.
15. All Q&A DOs: Doobie auto-derived `Read`/`Write`.

**Tests:**
16. `UserPreferenceDO` importance outside 1-10 rejected or database-enforced.
17. `MemberBillStanceDO.topics` round-trips Doobie `TEXT[]`.
18. Codec round-trip (Circe) for all user/score DOs.
19. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for all score DOs.
20. `ScoreHistoryDO` with `reasoning = None`/`Some(...)` round-trips.
20a. `ScoreDO.reasoningEmbedding = None`/`Some(Array[Float])` round-trips Doobie.
20b. `ScoreHistoryDO.reasoningEmbedding = None`/`Some(Array[Float])` round-trips Doobie.
20c. `ScoreDO.reasoningEmbedding = None` when `reasoning = None`.
21. Codec round-trip (Circe) for all Q&A DOs.
22. Doobie `Read`/`Write` round-trip for all Q&A DOs.
23. `QaUserResponseDO` with `selectedOption = Some(...)`, `customText = None` round-trips.
24. `QaUserResponseDO` with `selectedOption = None`, `customText = Some(...)` round-trips.
25. `QaQuestionTopicDO.weight` stores boundary (0.01, 0.5, 1.0).
26. `UserLegislatorPairingDO` Doobie round-trip.
27. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` Doobie round-trip with `reasoning = Some`/`None`.
28. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO` Doobie round-trip with `reasoningEmbedding = Some`/`None`.
29. `UserBillAlignmentDO` Doobie round-trip (all optionals populated).
30. `UserBillAlignmentDO` Doobie round-trip (all optionals `None`).
31. `UserAmendmentAlignmentDO` Doobie round-trip with `billId = Some`/`None`.
32. `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` Doobie round-trip (all timestamps `None` and populated).
33. Codec round-trip (Circe) for all scoring infrastructure DOs.
34. `MemberBillStanceTopicDO.stanceDirection` accepts "Progressive"/"Conservative"/"Neutral".
35. `UserBillAlignmentDO.alignmentScore` stores 0.0, 0.5, 1.0.
36. `StanceMaterializationStatusDO` represents scanner: `hasVotes = true AND allPassesCompleted = true AND stancesMaterializedAt < analysisCompletedAt`.
